rawAssistant: Tomorrow's task will be a delicate matter, as one of our lanterns blew out during last night's storm. Before you head out, make sure to inspect the plank and post where it was lodged; the wind might have loosened any remaining fastenings. A secure hold is crucial in these tempestuous hours.
